SCADA Standards Appendix A ­
Definitions and General Reference 
January 2025 
142
artifact_summary: Document page displaying vertical bar gauge diagrams for industrial measurements including level, pressure, and flow.
artifact_blurb: This technical document outlines SCADA visualization standards for industrial process monitoring, featuring vertical bar gauge diagrams that graphically represent specific instrument readings. The illustrations detail graphical conventions for a level transmitter (e.g., 5.5 feet), a pressure gauge, and a pump discharge flow meter (e.g., 550.0 GPM), demonstrating how precise values are mapped against their respective measurement scales.
